caption: Figure 1: Digital twin pre-training dynamics. (Left) Cross-entropy loss curve over 20 training epochs. (Right) Training and test accuracy curves, converging to 96.92% test accuracy in 20 epochs.
description2: The figure plots the digital twin pre-training dynamics, featuring a cross-entropy loss curve on the left and training and test accuracy curves on the right.
description3: Two-panel plot displays a line chart of cross-entropy loss versus epochs on the left, and training/test accuracy versus epochs on the right.
questions: How did the training process affect the loss and accuracy over time?
What is the general trend of training and test accuracy during pre-training?

caption: Figure 2: Hardware PCNN confusion matrix on the full MNIST test set (10,000 images). Rows represent true digit classes and columns represent predicted classes. The strong diagonal indicates high per-class accuracy across all 10 digits.
description2: The figure is a hardware PCNN confusion matrix plotting actual versus predicted digit classes for the full MNIST test set, with rows representing true classes and columns representing predicted classes.
description3: The confusion matrix, arranged in a grid, displays the counts of true digit classes versus predicted classes for a hardware PCNN.
questions: What does the diagonal pattern suggest about the model's accuracy?
How are the true digit classes organized relative to predicted classes?
